title: Lucille
description: This resource pack replaces Minecraft's Wooden Sword with Negan's bat, Lucille from TWD.
body:
This resource pack replaces Minecraft's Wooden Sword with Negan's bat, Lucille from TWD.

This version simply replaces the Wooden Sword's texture and renames it to "Lucille" in US English.

There is another Resource Pack that only changes the Wooden Sword's texture when you rename it as "Lucille" with an anvil. ([Link](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lucille-named))

![Negan holding Lucille](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sAAordv1/images/09738103d8b680fb94de588fccb7177fb1e665c7.png)

![Lucille shining](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sAAordv1/images/eb866834f84e3d1ea4a6c6e3c65ce2e04ae173c4.png)
